differentials.name: Varus = adduction =  axis of 1st metatarsal deviated medially relative to axis of talus
differentials.raw: Varus = adduction =  axis of 1st metatarsal deviated medially relative to axis of talus

differentials.name: Inversion = supination =  inward turning of sole of foot
differentials.raw: Inversion = supination =  inward turning of sole of foot

differentials.name: Eversion = pronation =  outward turning of sole of foot
differentials.raw: Eversion = pronation =  outward turning of sole of foot

differentials.name: HINDFOOT talipes = any deformity of the ankle and hindfoot
differentials.raw: HINDFOOT talipes = any deformity of the ankle and hindfoot [talus, Latin = ankle; pes, Latin = foot]

differentials.name: Equinus =  hindfoot abnormality with reversal of calcaneal pitch so that the heel cannot touch the ground
differentials.raw: Equinus =  hindfoot abnormality with reversal of calcaneal pitch so that the heel cannot touch the ground

differentials.name: Calcaneal foot =  very high calcaneal pitch so that forefoot cannot touch the ground
differentials.raw: Calcaneal foot =  very high calcaneal pitch so that forefoot cannot touch the ground

differentials.name: Pes planus = flatfoot =  low calcaneal pitch + (usually) heel valgus + forefoot eversion
differentials.raw: Pes planus = flatfoot =  low calcaneal pitch + (usually) heel valgus + forefoot eversion

differentials.name: Pes cavus =  high calcaneal pitch
differentials.raw: Pes cavus =  high calcaneal pitch (fixed high arch)

context: =  axis of 1st metatarsal deviated laterally relative to axis of talus
